title: Reobrix Books of The Kings Booknook Building Toy Set with Lights, Creative Military Bookends Block Kit, 66039 Bookshelf Home Decor Book Nook Model, Puzzle Gift for Adults Boys Girls 14+ (3307PCS)
features: 【ORIGINAL MOVIE THEME BLOCK BOOKENDS】 Exclusive design BOOKS OF THE KINGS theme block bookshelf set, breaking the traditional bookends modeling, three-dimensional relief process to restore the classic movie scenes, both collectible bookends and themed home decoration, to create an exclusive reading corner for you!

【3-In-1 TRANSFORMATIONAL ORGANIZER】 Innovative folio tri-fold structure design, 180 ° unfolded into a three-dimensional display shelf, 90 ° folded into a solid book file, 0 ° closed into a delicate ornaments, three forms of free switching, perfectly adapted to the desk / bookshelf / entrance and other multi-scenarios to use.

【IMMERSIVE SCENE MINIATURE WORLD】Internally equipped with blue sky and white clouds, trees and boats, character details are obviously portrayed, in-depth restoration of the details of the famous movie scenes, equipped with magnetic suction opening and closing door design, fingertip play to unlock the surprise eggs.

【INTELLIGENT LIGHT AND SHADOW AMBIENCE SYSTEM】 Exclusive built-in warm LED light set, three brightness levels controlled by independent switch, light projecting magical light effects through the hollowed-out window pane, and automatically switching to breathing light mode at night to create a desktop-level movie light show.

【PERFECT GIFT FOR ANY OCCASION】Reobrix bookshelf building block toy is not just a building block kit, it is also a fantastic decoration, perfect for boys, girls, teens and adults over 14 years old. It is an ideal gift for occasions such as Easter, birthdays, Christmas, parties, Halloween, Thanksgiving and New Year. Ideal for adults and classic movie fans who like challenges and new things.
